name: The Carney Family
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Friend,

We celebrate the joy of the holiday season and the promise of the New Year, with thanks to so many Delawareans who are working together to strengthen the bonds to one another and to brighten the hope for the future for all of our children.

Best wishes from our family to yours,
John, Tracey, Sam and Jimmy Carney

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
P.O. Box 2162
2nd Floor
Wilmington DE 19899 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/h3-7DDZUje6qItLV6gl-jg==/BSq3MeEtHOm6JjSpNC7C0w==
